document_title: Schedule of Base Unit Market Values for Residential, Commercial and Industrial Lands — Tadian

_meta.source: Office of the Provincial Assessor — GR FORM No. 1 (TADIAN, Office Order No. 01)
_meta.act: RA 12001 (Real Property Valuation and Assessment Reform Act), Section 15
notes: Tadian's commercial and residential ladders share the same ₱ value per tier (C-N = R-N for N = 1..12).
Replaces the earlier 3C + 6R draft. Existing zones tagged with the old schedule may need retagging.
Standard depth: 30 m, 1st strip, residential and commercial. Corner influence: 10% for both.

items.location_description: Commercial lots along National and Provincial roads of sitio Ol-is and TSAT to Tadian Central School; Bebe to Kawayan; Sagang barangay road; and along Lt. Marrero Street to Back Street of Poblacion.
